name: stratiq_analyze_brief
description: Upload and analyze a marketing brief (PDF/DOCX up to 100MB) to extract 3-7 strategic insight cards tagged by track (creative, events, art, digital, strategy). Uses ZDR-compliant AI processing — zero data retention, NDA-safe. Returns structured insight cards with titles, summaries, page references, track tags, and confidence scores.

briefId.description: Brief ID for analysis or deck generation

cardCount.description: Number of insight cards to generate (3-7)

tracks.description: Filter tracks: creative, events, art, digital, strategy
